rationale.completeness: Implements core requirements of saving conversation history to disk and resuming with --session flag, plus bonus --list-sessions feature. Missing --delete-session flag and session cleanup mechanisms.
rationale.correctness: Handles happy path well with session creation, loading, and saving. Has proper error handling for non-existent sessions, but lacks file locking which could cause corruption if process crashes mid-save.
rationale.style: Follows TypeScript conventions and existing codebase patterns. Imports are well-organized. Complex type for loadedSessionMessages is slightly hard to read but functional.
rationale.quality: Well-organized with clear separation of concerns in session-storage.ts. Comprehensive tests included. Some minor improvements possible like extracting complex types and adding JSDoc comments.
